nasb.text: Then Joab said to the Cushite, “Go, tell the king what you have seen.” So the Cushite bowed to Joab and ran.

esv.text: Then Joab said to the Cushite, “Go, tell the king what you have seen.” The Cushite bowed before Joab, and ran.

cnv.text: 於是約押對一個古實人說：“你去把你所看見的告訴王吧！”那古實人叩拜了約押，就跑去了。

ccb.text: 约押吩咐一个古示人：“你去把所看见的禀报给王。”那人就拜别了约押，马上跑回去报信。
